# Design: Best of RPI Flow + OpenSpec

## Overview

Enhance the Research-Plan-Implement (RPI) workflow by incorporating the strongest ideas from OpenSpec.

All commands adopt the `rpi-` prefix to establish a clear namespace (e.g., `/rpi-research` instead of `/create-research`).
